issues.criterion: Nav and footer documents exist on da.live (Check #5)
issues.details: The AEM admin status API (https://admin.hlx.page/status/manuel-vara/eds-migration/main/nav and .../footer) returns preview.status=404 and live.status=404 for both /nav and /footer. The phase5 docs explicitly confirm: 'EDS_TOKEN was not available in this run. All HTML config files are committed to .eds-migration/state/config/ on the migration-state branch. The following da.live uploads remain pending: POST /source/manuel-vara/eds-migration/nav and .../footer.' This is the same failure mode as the previous run: nav and footer HTML exist only in the migration-state branch, not on da.live. Every migrated page will render with collapsed <header></header> and <footer></footer>.
issues.remediation: Upload .eds-migration/state/config/nav.html via POST https://admin.da.live/source/manuel-vara/eds-migration/nav (with Authorization: Bearer $EDS_TOKEN and Content-Type: text/html). Do the same for footer.html. Then POST to https://admin.hlx.page/preview/manuel-vara/eds-migration/main/nav and .../footer to trigger preview generation. Confirm admin status returns 200 before re-verifying.

issues.criterion: Rendered nav and footer have real content in context (Check #6) — screenshot pairs mandatory
issues.details: The preview site https://main--eds-migration--manuel-vara.aem.page/ returns 404 (admin API confirms preview.status=404 for homepage, nav, and footer). Screenshot pairs comparing migrated chrome against source-bundle/chrome/header-desktop.png and footer-desktop.png are required by the verifier protocol but cannot be captured because the da.live content has not been uploaded. This is a direct consequence of the high-severity issue above.
issues.remediation: Once nav/footer are uploaded to da.live and preview is published, capture desktop (1440px) and mobile (390px) screenshots of the rendered homepage header and footer bands. Compare against source-bundle/chrome/header-desktop.png and footer-desktop.png with pHash similarity >= 0.75.

evidence.check: GitHub files on main (helix-query.yaml, helix-sitemap.yaml, robots.txt)
evidence.render_strategy: GitHub Contents API raw HTTP — no browser render required for API sidechannel
evidence.finding: All three files return HTTP 200: helix-query.yaml (200), helix-sitemap.yaml (200), robots.txt (200). PASS.
fstab.yaml mountpoints./ = 'https://content.da.live/manuel-vara/eds-migration' — DA.live mount point is correct and was not overwritten by config work. PASS.

evidence.render_strategy: GitHub raw HTTP + Python yaml.safe_load validation
evidence.finding: Valid YAML (python yaml.safe_load). version=1, 4 indices: site (/**→/query-index.json), events (/events/**→/events-index.json), news (/news/**→/news-index.json), knowledge (/knowledge/**→/knowledge-index.json). All indices have title, description, image, lastModified. Domain-specific fields: eventDate/Location/Type for events; publishDate/division/category for news; contentType/topic/expert for knowledge. PASS.

evidence.render_strategy: GitHub raw HTTP + Python yaml.safe_load validation
evidence.finding: Valid YAML (python yaml.safe_load). version=1, 4 sitemaps: default (/sitemap.xml, excludes /client-login/**, /careers/resources/**, /category/**, /drafts/**, /nav, /footer, /fragments/**; hreflang en→almacgroup.com{path}), events (/sitemap-events.xml), news (/sitemap-news.xml), knowledge (/sitemap-knowledge.xml). PASS.

evidence.render_strategy: Python HTMLParser on local state file (da.live upload pending — EDS_TOKEN unavailable)
evidence.finding: HTML table with DOCTYPE. Headers: ['Source', 'Destination']. 57 redirect rows (up from 55 in phase5 doc, accounting for 2 new pharmaceutical-development rows). pharmaceutical-development redirect present: '/pharmaceutical-development' → '/pharmaceutical-drug-product-development' AND trailing-slash variant '/pharmaceutical-development/' → '/pharmaceutical-drug-product-development'. PASS (content quality). NOTE: da.live upload is still pending due to missing EDS_TOKEN — cannot verify via admin.da.live API.

evidence.check: Nav link coverage vs source chrome (Check #7)
evidence.render_strategy: Python HTMLParser link extraction on local state file; source paths extracted from header.links.json (almacgroup.com paths only, stripped of tracking params)
evidence.finding: Nav coverage 99.6% (270/271 unique source almacgroup.com paths matched). The one missing path is '/commercial-services/wp-content/uploads/sites/9/2024/10/ALMAC_Pharma-16pp-Brochure-CORP-DIGITAL.pdf' — a PDF asset, appropriately excluded from nav. Total nav links in HTML: 296 (unique paths: 285, including EDS-relative paths not in source). This is a significant improvement from the previous 52.6% coverage. PASS (well above 60% threshold).

evidence.check: Footer link coverage vs source chrome (Check #7)
evidence.render_strategy: Python HTMLParser link extraction on local state file; source link texts from footer.links.json
evidence.finding: Footer coverage 100% (16/16 source link texts matched). All source footer links present: Careers, About Us, Our Locations, Latest News, Knowledge Centre, Almac Discovery, Almac Diagnostic Services, Privacy Policy, Galen Pharmaceuticals, +44/+1/+65 phone numbers, Company Information, Terms and Conditions, Privacy & Cookie Policy, Modern Slavery Statement. Migrated footer also adds LinkedIn/YouTube/Vimeo social links (not in source capture but present on site). PASS.

evidence.check: Nav and footer exist on da.live (Check #5) — FAIL
evidence.render_strategy: AEM Admin status API (public, no auth required); preview URL HTTP status check
evidence.finding: admin.hlx.page/status returns preview.status=404, live.status=404 for both /nav and /footer. Preview URL https://main--eds-migration--manuel-vara.aem.page/nav returns HTTP 404. Phase5 docs confirm: 'EDS_TOKEN was not available in this run... da.live uploads remain pending.' The nav/footer HTML content (369 and 48 lines respectively) has NOT been pushed to da.live. Every rendered page will produce collapsed empty <header> and <footer> — same failure as previous run. FAIL (high severity).

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright desktop (1440×900) and mobile (390×844) — attempted but aborted: preview site returns 404 for all pages because nav/footer not uploaded to da.live
evidence.finding: Cannot capture screenshot pairs — the preview site is 404 across all pages (homepage, /nav, /footer). Screenshot comparison is blocked by the da.live upload failure. FAIL (mandatory per verifier protocol).

summary: FAIL: Nav and footer HTML content is high-quality (99.6% nav coverage, 100% footer coverage, pharmaceutical-development redirect added) but neither document has been uploaded to da.live — admin API confirms 404 for /nav and /footer on both preview and live. All GitHub configs (helix-query.yaml, helix-sitemap.yaml, robots.txt, fstab.yaml) are correct. Blocked on EDS_TOKEN to complete da.live delivery.
